aboutHtml:
I’m Adi. I build AI products, agent infrastructure, and fun little internet experiments.

Currently I’m building Watercooler, a coordination surface and memory layer for coding agents.

Previously, I founded Koan Analytics, an AI platform for mineral exploration, and worked on product operations at DiDi.

selected work

  • Watercooler - coordination and memory systems for coding agents.
  • MakeMyClaw - one-click deploy infrastructure for OpenClaw and Hermes agents.
  • LearnFromLenny - an X agent that answers with Lenny Rachitsky’s product corpus.
  • Moltipedia - a playful experiment in agent-written knowledge systems.
